---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes on research, projects, and the occasional tangent."
engine: markdown
listing:
  contents: posts          # build the list from everything in posts/
  sort: "date desc"        # newest first
  type: default            # try: grid, table, default
  categories: true         # show a category cloud / filter
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true               # generate an RSS feed at blog.xml
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
